account_access_type.description: Specifies the type of access the account has to the Grafana workspace.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Grafana workspace.

authentication_providers.description: List of authentication providers used by the Grafana workspace.

created_date.description: The date when the Grafana workspace was created.

data_sources.description: List of data sources configured for the Grafana workspace.

description.description: A brief description of the Grafana workspace.

endpoint.description: The URL endpoint of the Grafana workspace.

grafana_version.description: The version of Grafana used in the workspace.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Grafana workspace.

last_updated_date.description: The date when the Grafana workspace was last updated.

name.description: The name of the Grafana workspace.

notification_destinations.description: List of notification destinations configured in the Grafana workspace.

organization_role_name.description: The name of the organization role associated with the Grafana workspace.

organizational_units.description: List of organizational units associated with the Grafana workspace.

permission_type.description: The type of permissions set for the Grafana workspace.

role_arn.description: The ARN of the role associated with the Grafana workspace.

saml_configuration_status.description: The status of SAML configuration for the Grafana workspace.

stack_set_name.description: The name of the stack set associated with the Grafana workspace.

status.description: The current status of the Grafana workspace.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the Grafana workspace.
